nasb.text: It has made my vine a waste And my fig tree splinters. It has stripped them bare and cast them away; Their branches have become white.

esv.text: It has laid waste my vine and splintered my fig tree; it has stripped off their bark and thrown it down; their branches are made white.

cnv.text: 他們使我的葡萄樹荒涼， 折斷了我的無花果樹， 把樹皮剝盡，丟在一旁， 使枝條露白。

ccb.text: 它们毁坏我的葡萄树和无花果树， 剥光树皮， 只留下光秃的树枝。
